notes:
Skip buttons are now track-aware. Audio tracks (and audio+transcript pairs) keep the existing −15s / +15s time-jump behavior. Text-only tracks (the ones playing via TTS) switch to −¶ / +¶ paragraph navigation: forward jumps to the first sentence of the next

/

  • /
    ; back jumps to the start of the current paragraph if mid-way through, otherwise to the previous paragraph. Button labels and tooltips update on each track load to match the active mode.
